description.brazilian: Conclua o tutorial.
description.english: Complete the tutorial.
description.french: Terminez le tutoriel.
description.german: Schließe das Tutorial ab.
description.russian: Пройди обучение.
description.schinese: 完成教程。
description.spanish: Completa el tutorial.

description.brazilian: Colete todas as páginas do diário.
description.english: Collect all diary pages.
description.french: Récupérez toutes les pages du journal.
description.german: Sammle alle Tagebuchseiten.
description.russian: Собери все страницы дневника.
description.schinese: 收集所有日记书页。
description.spanish: Recoge todas las páginas del diario.

description.brazilian: Morra.
description.english: Die.
description.french: Mourez.
description.german: Stirb.
description.russian: Погибни.
description.schinese: 死亡。
description.spanish: Muere.

description.brazilian: Conclua todas as missões.
description.english: Complete all quests.
description.french: Terminez toutes les quêtes.
description.german: Schließe alle Quests ab.
description.russian: Выполни все просьбы.
description.schinese: 完成所有任务。
description.spanish: Completa todas las misiones.

displayName.brazilian: Eu me lembro dos rostos deles...
displayName.french: Je me souviens de leurs visages...
displayName.german: Ich erinnere mich an ihre Gesichter...

description.brazilian: Mate todos os tipos de inimigos em combate corpo a corpo.
description.english: Kill every enemy type in melee.
description.french: Tuez chaque type d'ennemi au corps à corps.
description.german: Töte jeden Feindtyp im Nahkampf.
description.russian: Убей каждый вид врага врукопашную.
description.schinese: 在近战中击杀每一种类型的敌人。
description.spanish: Mata a todos los tipos de enemigos cuerpo a cuerpo.

description.brazilian: Maximize a reputação com os civis.
description.english: Maximize reputation with civilians.
description.french: Maximisez votre réputation auprès des civils.
description.german: Maximiere den Ruf bei den Zivilisten.
description.russian: Добейся максимального уровня репутации у местного населения.
description.schinese: 将平民声望提升至最高。
description.spanish: Maximiza la reputación con los civiles.

description.brazilian: Evacue com todas as missões concluídas 12 vezes.
description.english: Evacuate with all missions completed 12 times.
description.french: Évacuez avec toutes les missions terminées 12 fois.
description.german: Evakuiere 12 Mal mit allen abgeschlossenen Missionen.
description.russian: Выполни все задачи и эвакуируйся — и так 12 раз.
description.schinese: 在完成所有任务的情况下撤离12次。
description.spanish: Evacúa con todas las misiones completadas 12 veces.

description.brazilian: Conclua todas as missões e evacue, matando inimigos apenas com ataques furtivos (mínimo de 5 mortes).
description.english: Complete all missions and evacuate, killing enemies only with stealth attacks (minimum 5 kills).
description.french: Terminez toutes les missions et évacuez, en ne tuant les ennemis qu'avec des attaques furtives (minimum 5 éliminations).
description.german: Schließe alle Missionen ab und evakuiere, wobei du Feinde nur mit heimlichen Angriffen tötest (mindestens 5 Kills).
description.russian: Выполни все задачи и эвакуируйся, устраняя врагов исключительно скрытыми атаками (минимум 5 убийств).
description.schinese: 完成所有任务并撤离，仅用潜行攻击击杀敌人（至少击杀5人）。
description.spanish: Completa todas las misiones y evacúa, matando a los enemigos solo con ataques sigilosos (mínimo 5 bajas).

description.brazilian: Conclua todas as missões e evacue sem matar ninguém.
description.english: Complete all missions and evacuate without killing anyone.
description.french: Terminez toutes les missions et évacuez sans tuer personne.
description.german: Schließe alle Missionen ab und evakuiere, ohne jemanden zu töten.
description.russian: Выполни все задачи и эвакуируйся никого не убив.
description.schinese: 完成所有任务并撤离，不杀任何人。
description.spanish: Completa todas las misiones y evacúa sin matar a nadie.

description.brazilian: Evacue com 1 de saúde e 0 de saciedade.
description.english: Evacuate with 1 health and 0 satiety.
description.french: Évacuez avec 1 point de vie et 0 de satiété.
description.german: Evakuiere mit 1 Gesundheit und 0 Sättigung.
description.russian: Эвакуируйся с 1 здоровья и 0 сытости.
description.schinese: 在1点生命值和0点饱食度的情况下撤离。
description.spanish: Evacúa con 1 de salud y 0 de saciedad.

description.brazilian: Queime 3 inimigos diferentes com um único ataque de napalm.
description.english: Burn 3 different enemies with a single napalm strike.
description.french: Brûlez 3 ennemis différents avec une seule frappe de napalm.
description.german: Verbrenne 3 verschiedene Feinde mit einem einzigen Napalmangriff.
description.russian: Сожги 3 разных врага одним ударом напалма.
description.schinese: 用一次凝固汽油弹打击烧死3个不同的敌人。
description.spanish: Quema a 3 enemigos diferentes con un solo ataque de napalm.

description.brazilian: Exploda 3 ou mais cadáveres em um quadrado.
description.english: Blow up 3 or more corpses in one tile.
description.french: Faites exploser 3 cadavres ou plus sur une case.
description.german: Sprenge 3 oder mehr Leichen auf einem Feld.
description.russian: Взорви 3 или более трупов в одном квадрате.
description.schinese: 在一个方格内炸毁3具或更多尸体。
description.spanish: Vuela 3 o más cadáveres en una casilla.

description.brazilian: Mate um inimigo com um contra-ataque depois que ele atacar você corpo a corpo.
description.english: Kill an enemy with a counterattack after they attack you in melee.
description.french: Tuez un ennemi avec une contre-attaque après qu'il vous ait attaqué au corps à corps.
description.german: Töte einen Feind mit einem Gegenangriff, nachdem er dich im Nahkampf angegriffen hat.
description.russian: Убей ответной атакой врага, напавшего на тебя врукопашную.
description.schinese: 在敌人近战攻击你后，用反击杀死他们。
description.spanish: Mata a un enemigo con un contraataque después de que te ataque cuerpo a cuerpo.

description.brazilian: Fuja da morte em um túnel usando uma lanterna.
description.english: Escape death in a tunnel by using a flashlight.
description.french: Échappez à la mort dans un tunnel en utilisant une lampe torche.
description.german: Entgehe dem Tod in einem Tunnel, indem du eine Taschenlampe benutzt.
description.russian: Спасись от смерти в тоннеле применив фонарик.
description.schinese: 使用手电筒在隧道中逃过一劫。
description.spanish: Escapa de la muerte en un túnel usando una linterna.

description.brazilian: Destrua um inimigo com C4.
description.english: Destroy an enemy with C4.
description.french: Détruisez un ennemi avec du C4.
description.german: Zerstöre einen Feind mit C4.
description.russian: Уничтожь врага с помощью С4.
description.schinese: 用C4炸药消灭一个敌人。
description.spanish: Destruye a un enemigo con C4.

description.brazilian: Passe 10 minutos na base.
description.english: Spend 10 minutes at the base.
description.french: Passez 10 minutes à la base.
description.german: Verbringe 10 Minuten in der Basis.
description.russian: Проведи на базе не менее 10 минут.
description.schinese: 在基地度过10分钟。
description.spanish: Pasa 10 minutos en la base.

description.brazilian: Tenha 3 granadas de fumaça ativas ao mesmo tempo.
description.english: Have 3 smoke grenades active at the same time.
description.french: Ayez 3 grenades fumigènes actives en même temps.
description.german: Habe 3 Rauchgranaten gleichzeitig aktiv.
description.russian: Активируй 3 дымовые гранаты одновременно.
description.schinese: 同时激活3颗烟雾弹。
description.spanish: Ten 3 granadas de humo activas al mismo tiempo.

description.brazilian: Destrua 4 inimigos com um único ataque de artilharia.
description.english: Destroy 4 enemies with a single artillery strike.
description.french: Détruisez 4 ennemis avec une seule frappe d'artillerie.
description.german: Zerstöre 4 Feinde mit einem einzigen Artillerieangriff.
description.russian: Уничтожь 4 врагов одним артиллерийским ударом.
description.schinese: 用一次炮击消灭4个敌人。
description.spanish: Destruye a 4 enemigos con un solo ataque de artillería.

description.brazilian: Destrua todas as cabanas na zona de operações.
description.english: Destroy every hut in the operational zone.
description.french: Détruisez chaque hutte dans la zone d'opération.
description.german: Zerstöre jede Hütte im Operationsgebiet.
description.russian: Уничтожь все хижины в оперативной зоне.
description.schinese: 摧毁行动区域内的每一座茅草屋。
description.spanish: Destruye todas las cabañas en la zona de operaciones.

description.brazilian: Retorne ao jogo após um intervalo de pelo menos 24 horas.
description.english: Return to the game after a break of at least 24 hours.
description.french: Retournez au jeu après une pause d'au moins 24 heures.
description.german: Kehre nach einer Pause von mindestens 24 Stunden ins Spiel zurück.
description.russian: Вернись в игру после перерыва не менее чем в 24 часа.
description.schinese: 在至少24小时的休息后重返游戏。
description.spanish: Vuelve al juego tras un descanso de al menos 24 horas.

description.brazilian: Suba de nível até 100%
description.english: Level up to 100%
description.french: Montez de niveau à 100 %
description.german: Steige auf 100 % auf
description.russian: Прокачайся на 100%.
description.schinese: 升级至100%
description.spanish: Sube de nivel al 100%

description.brazilian: Encontre uma arma inimiga e entregue-a na base.
description.english: Find an enemy weapon and deliver it to the base.
description.french: Trouvez une arme ennemie et livrez-la à la base.
description.german: Finde eine feindliche Waffe und bringe sie zur Basis.
description.russian: Найди трофейное оружие врага и доставь его на базу.
description.schinese: 找到一把敌方武器并将其带回基地。
description.spanish: Encuentra un arma enemiga y entrégala en la base.

displayName.brazilian: A cavalaria não vai esperar para sempre
displayName.spanish: La caballería no esperará para siempre

description.brazilian: Chame o helicóptero de evacuação e deixe-o ir embora sem você.
description.english: Call the evacuation helicopter and let it fly away without you.
description.french: Appelez l'hélicoptère d'évacuation et laissez-le repartir sans vous.
description.german: Rufe den Evakuierungshubschrauber und lass ihn ohne dich wegfliegen.
description.russian: Вызови вертолет для эвакуации и позволь ему улететь без тебя.
description.schinese: 呼叫撤离直升机并让它丢下你飞走。
description.spanish: Llama al helicóptero de evacuación y deja que se vaya sin ti.

description.brazilian: Conclua 3 tarefas e evacue sem trazer rações, kits médicos ou sinalizadores de evacuação.
description.english: Complete 3 tasks and evacuate without bringing any rations, medkits, or evacuation flares.
description.french: Terminez 3 tâches et évacuez sans emporter de rations, de trousses de secours ou de fusées d'évacuation.
description.german: Schließe 3 Aufgaben ab und evakuiere, ohne Rationen, Medkits oder Evakuierungsfackeln mitzubringen.
description.russian: Выполни 3 задачи и эвакуируйся, не взяв на вылет рационов, аптечек и эвакуационных шашек.
description.schinese: 完成3项任务并撤离，不带任何口粮、医疗包或撤离信号弹。
description.spanish: Completa 3 tareas y evacúa sin llevar raciones, botiquines ni bengalas de evacuación.

description.brazilian: Escale todas as montanhas na zona de operações.
description.english: Climb every mountain in the operational zone.
description.french: Escaladez chaque montagne dans la zone d'opération.
description.german: Erklimme jeden Berg im Operationsgebiet.
description.russian: Поднимись на каждую гору оперативной зоны.
description.schinese: 攀登行动区域内的每一座山峰。
description.spanish: Escala todas las montañas en la zona de operaciones.
